subject: Add feature-server-pool to the ONAP drools-pdp repository.
commit_message:
Add feature-server-pool to the ONAP drools-pdp repository.

Issue-ID: POLICY-2351
Change-Id: I8ddde547a73a51c04c8dd9f1d66232e8281599a9
Signed-off-by: Straubs, Ralph (rs8887) <rs8887@att.com>

Patch Set 3:

(22 comments)

A first set of comments, I still need to review the core java functionality, but to move things along.

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> (1 comment)

This is on a different port, and is used for communication between servers, among other things. I will move it back to where it was (org.onap.policy.drools.serverpool).

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> (1 comment)

The REST call in RestServerPool is a mixture of commands for humans and machine-to-machine communication, all the ones begin with /cmd/ are for humans. I will keep it in org.onap.policy.drools.serverpool as it is part of server-pool.

Patch Set 3:

We'll need resolution of this quickly - an easy start is to fix the JIRA problem identified upon initial submission.

Patch Set 3:

(145 comments)

The code is almost ready, I will wrap it up today.
